case_title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. VS. RAYMOND E MIMS

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MIMS, RAYMOND E $7,163.12 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,163.12, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MIMS, RAYMOND E $3,520.14 PRINCIPAL, $111.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,631.14, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $3,501.98 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT.
